title: Admin - View Partner Management Dashboard - Functional Test Plan
author: QA Automation
overview: Functional testing of the Admin Partner Management Dashboard on the AT/AD Admin Portal. Covers dashboard metric cards display (Pending vendor approvals, Active partners, Total products, Average approval time), data accuracy, real-time/reload data refresh, empty state handling, API failure fallback with retry, and performance under large data volumes.

inScope: Dashboard metric cards visibility and layout
Pending vendor approvals count display and accuracy
Active partners count display and accuracy
Total products count display and accuracy
Average approval time display and accuracy
Empty state display when no vendors exist
API failure fallback message and retry option
outOfScope: Vendor list filtering and detail views
Dashboard layout responsiveness across all device sizes

relatedStories: SCRUM-442 - Admin Sign-In (prerequisite for dashboard access)

prerequisites: Admin is signed in to the Admin Portal
Partner Management Dashboard is accessible from navigation
Test data includes vendors in various states (pending, active)

testCases.title: Verify Partner Management Dashboard is accessible after admin login
testCases.preconditions: Admin is signed in to the Admin Portal
steps: Log in to the Admin Portal with valid credentials
Navigate to the Partner Management Dashboard
Verify the dashboard page loads successfully
expectedResults: Partner Management Dashboard is accessible via navigation
Dashboard page loads and displays metric cards section

testCases.title: Verify Pending Vendor Approvals count is displayed
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Dashboard displays Pending vendor approvals count
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Partner Management Dashboard with existing vendor data
steps: Navigate to the Partner Management Dashboard
Locate the Pending Vendor Approvals metric card
Verify the count is displayed as a numeric value
Verify the card has a clear label identifying it as pending approvals
expectedResults: Pending Vendor Approvals card is visible
Label clearly reads 'Pending Vendor Approvals' or similar

testCases.title: Verify Active Partners count is displayed
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Dashboard displays Active partners count
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Partner Management Dashboard with existing vendor data
steps: Navigate to the Partner Management Dashboard
Locate the Active Partners metric card
Verify the count is displayed as a numeric value
Verify the card has a clear label identifying it as active partners
expectedResults: Label clearly reads 'Active Partners' or similar

testCases.title: Verify Total Products count is displayed
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Dashboard displays Total products count
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Partner Management Dashboard with existing product data
steps: Navigate to the Partner Management Dashboard
Locate the Total Products metric card
Verify the count is displayed as a numeric value
Verify the card has a clear label identifying it as total products
expectedResults: Label clearly reads 'Total Products' or similar

testCases.title: Verify Average Approval Time is displayed
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Dashboard displays Average approval time
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Partner Management Dashboard with approval history data
steps: Navigate to the Partner Management Dashboard
Locate the Average Approval Time metric card
Verify the value is displayed with appropriate units (e.g., hours, days)
Verify the card has a clear label identifying it as average approval time
expectedResults: Average Approval Time card is visible
A value with time units is displayed (e.g., '2.5 days')
Label clearly reads 'Average Approval Time' or similar

testCases.title: Verify all four metric cards are displayed simultaneously
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Dashboard displays all four metrics
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Partner Management Dashboard
steps: Navigate to the Partner Management Dashboard
Verify all four metric cards are visible on the page without scrolling
Verify cards are: Pending Vendor Approvals, Active Partners, Total Products, Average Approval Time
expectedResults: All four metric cards are visible simultaneously
Each card displays its respective label and value

testCases.title: Verify Pending Vendor Approvals count accuracy
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Dashboard displays accurate Pending vendor approvals count
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Dashboard and the number of pending vendors is known from backend/API
steps: Query the backend or API for the actual count of pending vendor approvals
Navigate to the Partner Management Dashboard
Compare the displayed Pending Vendor Approvals count with the backend value
expectedResults: Displayed count matches the backend value exactly

testCases.title: Verify Active Partners count accuracy
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Dashboard displays accurate Active partners count
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Dashboard and the number of active partners is known from backend/API
steps: Query the backend or API for the actual count of active partners
Navigate to the Partner Management Dashboard
Compare the displayed Active Partners count with the backend value
expectedResults: Displayed count matches the backend value exactly

testCases.title: Verify Total Products count accuracy
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Dashboard displays accurate Total products count
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Dashboard and the total product count is known from backend/API
steps: Query the backend or API for the actual total product count
Navigate to the Partner Management Dashboard
Compare the displayed Total Products count with the backend value
expectedResults: Displayed count matches the backend value exactly

testCases.title: Verify Average Approval Time accuracy
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Dashboard displays accurate Average approval time
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Dashboard and the average approval time is known from backend/API
steps: Query the backend or API for the actual average approval time
Navigate to the Partner Management Dashboard
Compare the displayed Average Approval Time with the backend value
expectedResults: Displayed value matches the backend value (within acceptable rounding)
testCases.postconditions: Average approval time accuracy is verified

testCases.title: Verify data refreshes on page reload
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC2 - Data refreshes in real time or on page reload
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Partner Management Dashboard
steps: Note the current metric values on the dashboard
Trigger a data change in the backend (e.g., approve a pending vendor)
Reload the dashboard page (browser refresh)
Observe the updated metric values
expectedResults: Metric values update to reflect the backend change
testCases.postconditions: Dashboard shows refreshed data after reload

testCases.title: Verify dashboard supports keyboard navigation
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Partner Management Dashboard
steps: Use Tab key to navigate through the metric cards
Verify each card receives focus
Verify focus indicators are visible on each card

testCases.title: Verify metric cards have accessible labels for screen readers
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Partner Management Dashboard
steps: Inspect each metric card for aria-label or accessible text
Verify the label includes both the metric name and value
Verify screen reader can announce each card's content
expectedResults: Each card has an accessible label or aria-label
Labels include metric name and value (e.g., 'Pending Vendor Approvals: 5')
Screen reader announces card content correctly

testCases.title: Verify complete Partner Management Dashboard flow end-to-end
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1-AC2 and Edge Cases - Complete Flow
testCases.preconditions: Admin has valid credentials and vendor data exists
steps: Log in to the Admin Portal
Navigate to the Partner Management Dashboard
Verify all four metric cards are displayed with values
Note the current metric values
Reload the page
Verify metric values are consistent after reload
Verify no errors or broken UI elements
expectedResults: All four metrics (Pending Approvals, Active Partners, Total Products, Avg Approval Time) are displayed
Values remain consistent (or update if backend data changed)

vendorData: Environment with no vendors (for empty state testing)
productData: Large volume of products (5000+) for performance testing
apiSimulation: Ability to simulate Metrics API failure (500 error or network block)
Ability to restore API after failure simulation

assumptions: Admin Portal is accessible and admin sign-in works (SCRUM-442)
Partner Management Dashboard is reachable from the admin navigation
Metrics API provides data for all four dashboard cards
Test environment can be configured with varying vendor/product counts
API failure can be simulated in the test environment
risks: Real-time refresh mechanism is unclear — may be polling, WebSocket, or reload-only
Performance thresholds for 'acceptable' load time are not defined in the story
Empty state guidance text/design is not specified in the story
Average Approval Time display format (hours vs days) is not specified
openQuestions: What is the expected display format for Average Approval Time (hours, days, or dynamic)?
Is real-time refresh implemented via polling, WebSocket, or is page reload the only mechanism?
What is the acceptable performance threshold for dashboard load time?
What guidance text should be shown in the empty state?
What is the exact fallback error message text for API failures?
Are the metric cards styled as cards, tiles, or a different UI pattern?
Note: The 'Counts are clickable and redirect to filtered vendor lists' AC was removed in the latest description update (2026-04-15). Confirm this is intentional.
notesFromChangelog: Description was updated on 2026-04-15: 'Total vendors' was changed to 'Total products', and the 'Counts are clickable and redirect to filtered vendor lists' acceptance criterion was removed.
